name: Tony Palermo's Michigan Champ Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and drain. Set aside.
2. Heat oil in a large pan. Add garlic, 2 onions, green peppers, and jalapeno peppers. Sauté on medium heat for about 5 minutes until fragrant.
3. Stir in all spices (chili powder, oregano, sweet basil, thyme, rosemary, salt, white pepper, cumin powder). Cook for approximately 3 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
4. Add the remaining tomatoes (from the No.10 cans), tomato paste, and sour cream. Stir well.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally, until the chili reaches your desired consistency and flavor.
6. Garnish with additional sour cream before serving.
